description: CI-safe runner fixture for broker /health repeated-latency diagnostics and no-live readiness proof. Synthetic only: it must not touch a live broker, Gateway, Telegram/provider, production DB, or terminal ACK path.

payload.title: Runner fixture support for broker /health latency and diagnostics regression
payload.focus: Validate fixture/tooling support for repeated broker /health latency probes, stage-level diagnostics, and no-live closeout proof without touching production services.
payload.acceptance: Fixture parses; conversion to RunnerTask preserves issue/run metadata; repeated /health plan requires p95/p99 thresholds and stage diagnostics; no-live proof forbids broker/Gateway restarts, provider sends, DB mutation, and terminal ACK.
payload.prompt: CI-safe fixture validation only. Do not call live broker /health, restart services, send provider messages, mutate production DBs, or ACK terminal evidence.

operatorChecklist: Run npm test in CI/local fixture mode only; do not call a live broker endpoint.
Confirm repeated /health plan includes p95/p99 <= 500ms thresholds over 100 samples.
Confirm stage diagnostics cover persistenceSummary, hotEntityMirrorCounts, auditDiagnostics, requestPressure, and jsonSerialization.
Confirm closeout evidence says provider accepted-send is not terminal ACK, read receipt, visibility proof, or operator approval.
If a production-like run is needed later, require explicit operator approval before any broker/Gateway restart, live provider send, DB mutation, or terminal ACK.
